parsing_res_list.block_content: #### We can see computers at most of the places. Let us see the places where computers are seen.
#### We can see different types of computer all around. Some are big and some are very small.
Smartphone is also a type of computer.
Look carefully at the pictures given above about "Places Where Computers Can Be Seen" and fill in the blanks.

1. We can see desktops in use in/at ___ and in office.

2. We can see tablets in use in/at ___
3. We can see laptops in use in/at - Aamk8
4. We can see ___ in use at shops and malls.

markdown.text:
#### We can see computers at most of the places. Let us see the places where computers are seen.
At homes
At shops and malls
At schools
At airports
At restaurants
In offices
At railway stations
In banks TYPES OF COMPUTER
This is a laptop.
#### We can see different types of computer all around. Some are big and some are very small. This is a desktop.
This is a tablet.
##### WISDOM BOX Smartphone is also a type of computer.
Look carefully at the pictures given above about "Places Where Computers Can Be Seen" and fill in the blanks. 1. We can see desktops in use in/at ___ and in office. 2. We can see tablets in use in/at ___ 3. We can see laptops in use in/at - Aamk8 4. We can see ___ in use at shops and malls.
